hotels.description_en:
Comfortable Accommodations: 7 Toritos Hotel Boutique by Hacienda in Cusco offers family rooms with wardrobes, TVs, and sofa beds. Each room includes a private bathroom and free WiFi.
Essential Facilities: Guests can relax in the garden or stay connected with free WiFi. Additional services include a paid shuttle, 24-hour front desk, daily housekeeping, full-day security, and luggage storage.
Breakfast and Dining: A buffet breakfast is served with juice, cheese, and fruits. The hotel also provides a variety of dining options for guests.
Nearby Attractions: Located in the city centre, the hotel is a short walk from the Inka Museum (3 minutes), Cusco Main Square (500 metres), and the Cathedral of Cusco (5 minutes). Alejandro Velasco Astete International Airport is 5 km away.

hotels.description_it:
In una posizione ideale nel centro di Cuzco, 7 Toritos Hotel Boutique by Hacienda propone la colazione a buffet e il WiFi gratuito in tutta la struttura. Questo hotel a 3 stelle offre anche un giardino. L'alloggio Ã¨ interamente non fumatori ed Ã¨ ubicato a 2,8 km da Stazione Ferroviaria di Wanchaq.
Presso questo hotel, le camere sono dotate di armadio e TV.
Lo staff della reception Ã¨ a vostra disposizione e parla inglese e spagnolo.
I luoghi di interesse piÃ¹ famosi nei dintorni di 7 Toritos Hotel Boutique by Hacienda includono Inka Museum, Sito Archeologico di Sacsayhuaman e Holy Family Church. Aeroporto Internazionale Alejandro Velasco Astete si trova a 5 km dalla struttura, e la struttura offre una navetta aeroportuale a pagamento.

hotels.name: Amaru Inca
hotels.description_fr:
In CuscoÂ´s San Blas art district, Amaru Inca is set in a colonial house with internal patio and garden, featuring scenic views. Accommodation includes private bathroom, free WiFi on common areas and buffet breakfast is served daily.
Rooms at Amaru Inca are furbished with wooden flooring, regional dÃ©cor details and TV. They fit up to 4 people.
Free luggage storage use to our guests is available.
Guests can enjoy a free-use tea station in the courtyard. There is also a tour desk and a computer room with free Wi-Fi access.
Amaru Inca I is located just 2 blocks from CuscoÂ´s Cathedral and the Inka Museum.
